prestazioni: Engine swap to a Hyundai Beta II 2.0L Turbo (G4GC) with forged internals: Manley forged pistons (87.5mm, 8.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) running 18 psi on a custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust with a Tomei 80mm titanium tip. Fuel system upgraded with Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors, Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator. ECU reflash via Syvecs S6Plus standalone with custom maps for E85 compatibility and launch control.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (adjustable compression/rebound damping, 30-way adjustability) paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear). Polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part numbers SPF0115K for front control arms, SPF0116K for rear trailing arms) and spherical bearing subframe collars from Hardrace (GK-specific). Braking system upgraded to StopTech ST-60 two-piece rotors (328mm front, 302mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a Cusco OS Type 2 limited-slip differential (2-way, 45% preload) and a Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch (puck-style, 600 lb-ft torque capacity) with a billet flywheel. Transmission synchros upgraded to OEM Hyundai Motorsport carbon fiber units (part number 41301-2B000) and a short-shift kit from CAE (Ultra-Shifter, 30% reduction in throw). Final drive ratio changed to 4.47:1 for improved acceleration, with a Quaife ATB helical LSD for the rear.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Pandem GK-specific widebody kit (Pandem Type 1, fiberglass construction) with extended fenders (30mm front, 40mm rear), custom front bumper canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler. Carbon fiber hood from Seibon (OEM replacement, 50% weight reduction) with a vented heat extractor and a custom front splitter from Varis (3-piece, adjustable angle). Side skirts and rear diffuser from Vertex (GK-specific, ABS plastic with carbon fiber weave overlay).

Wheel setup with Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2-piece forged wheels (18x9.5 +20 front, 18x10.5 +25 rear) in a custom bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Custom wheel spacers from Hardrace (15mm front, 25mm rear) with extended wheel studs (M12x1.5, 60mm length). Brake caliper paint from Duplicolor (Hyper Silver) with custom laser-etched Hyundai Motorsport logos.

Interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (fixed-back, carbon fiber shell) upholstered in Alcantara (custom pattern: black with red stitching) and matching door cards from Status Racing. Custom roll cage from Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded chromoly, bolt-in design) with a Sparco 6-point harness (ASM10). Steering wheel replaced with a Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede) and a NRG quick-release hub. Gauge cluster upgraded to a Defi Advance BF series (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted on a custom A-pillar pod from AEM.
